data.body: 5274 (deprecation registry) implemented+committed (36f6373c, change pushed). New rebar._deprecations.py machine-readable registry + warn_deprecated helper; 10 emission sites routed through it; 3 silent removals now signal; permanent-alias wording fixed; AST source-scan completeness test (non-hollow). config.py stayed 938 (no ceiling bump). ruff+targeted tests (config/llm/advisory/mcp) green. Next: 7c92 (remove the 7 scheduled shims).
